login.title: Sign in to MIKA Services
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to access the application
login.headline:
Manage. Track.
Succeed.
login.sub: Access your business tools, manage your teams and track performance in real time.
login.mission1Desc: Overhaul, development and modernisation of urban and suburban axes in Greater Libreville.
login.mission2Desc: Construction of key structures: bridges, interchanges, national roads and public infrastructure.
login.mission3Desc: Project management for high national-value projects, including the Owendo Bypass (14 km).
login.mission4Desc: End-to-end management of large-scale projects with real-time reporting and rigorous quality control.
login.mission5Desc: Promoting Gabonese expertise, creating sustainable jobs and skills transfer.
login.mission6Desc: 100 billion FCFA contract for the transformation of Greater Libreville — national benchmark.
login.feature2Desc: Projects and resources in one place.
login.feature3Desc: GDPR compliant and secure access to your data.
login.formSub: Enter your credentials to access your workspace
login.formSubtitle: Sign in to your MIKA Services account
login.errorBadCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
login.errorRateLimit: Too many login attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.errorAccountLocked: Account temporarily locked after too many attempts. Try again later or use Forgot password.
login.errorNetwork: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection.
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again or contact the administrator.
login.validationPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address. If it exists in our system, you will receive a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set your new password.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.missingToken: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

twoFa.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code displayed by your authenticator app.
twoFa.codeMinLength: Code must be at least 6 characters
twoFa.setupSubtitle: Scan the QR code with an app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) then enter the displayed code to confirm.
twoFa.disableSubtitle: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.
twoFa.enabledDesc: Two-factor authentication is active. Your account is better protected.
twoFa.notEnabledDesc: Enable 2FA to strengthen your account security with a TOTP app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
